debug_info.goal:
case cons
α : Type u_1
l1✝ l2✝ : List α
x : α
l₁✝ l₂✝ : List α
l1 : l₁✝.Perm l₂✝
l2 :
  ∀ {idx1 : Fin l₁✝.length} {idx2 : Fin l₂✝.length},
    l₁✝[idx1] = l₂✝[idx2] → (l₁✝.eraseIdx ↑idx1).Perm (l₂✝.eraseIdx ↑idx2)
⊢ ∀ {idx1 : Fin (x :: l₁✝).length} {idx2 : Fin (x :: l₂✝).length},
    (x :: l₁✝)[idx1] = (x :: l₂✝)[idx2] → ((x :: l₁✝).eraseIdx ↑idx1).Perm ((x :: l₂✝).eraseIdx ↑idx2)

proof:
have key : ∀ (l : List α) (n : Nat) (h : n < l.length), (l[n] :: l.eraseIdx n).Perm l := by
            intro l n h
            induction l generalizing n with
            | nil => simp at h
            | cons hd tl ih =>
              cases n with
              | zero => simp [List.eraseIdx]
              | succ n =>
                simp only [List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
                simp only [List.length_cons, Nat.add_lt_add_iff_right] at h
                exact List.Perm.trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _) ((ih n h).cons hd)
          intro i j hij
          rcases i with ⟨ _ | i, hi ⟩ <;> rcases j with ⟨ _ | j, hj ⟩ <;> simp_all +decide [ List.eraseIdx ]
          · simp only [List.length_cons] at hj
            exact l1.trans (key _ j (by omega)).symm
          · simp only [List.length_cons] at hi
            rw [← hij]
            exact (key _ i (by omega)).trans l1
          · simp only [List.length_cons] at hi hj
            exact l2 (idx1 := ⟨i, by omega⟩) (idx2 := ⟨j, by omega⟩) hij

                simp only [List.length_cons, Nat.add_lt_add_iff_right] at h
                exact List.Perm.trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _) ((ih n h).cons hd)
          intro i j hij
          rcases i with ⟨ _ | i, hi ⟩ <;> rcases j with ⟨ _ | j, hj ⟩ <;> simp_all +decide [ List.eraseIdx ]
          · simp only [List.length_cons] at hj

          · simp only [List.length_cons] at hi hj
            exact l2 (idx1 := ⟨i, by omega⟩) (idx2 := ⟨j, by omega⟩) hij
